schoolSelection.title: Select Target Schools for Emma
schoolSelection.description: Choose up to 4 grammar schools Emma is applying to.
schoolSelection.helper: We tailor practice, difficulty, and mock exams based on each school's format.
schoolSelection.callout: Select at least 1 school. You can update this later.
schoolSelection.selectedHelper: We'll personalise practice for these schools
schoolSelection.emptyState: Select at least 1 school to continue
schoolSelection.searchPlaceholder: Search by school name or town...

titles.firstChild: Set up your first child's profile

subtitles.firstChild: We'll use this to build a personalised learning path.
subtitles.otherChild: Each child gets their own learning path and progress.

createChildProfile.lastChildWarning: ⚠ This is your {{ordinal}} and final child profile (you can manage profiles anytime in settings).
createChildProfile.personaliseNote: This helps us personalise your child's learning path from day one.

username.label: Username
username.helperFallback: These details are for your child to log in and practise

password.label: Password
password.helperFallback: Used by your child to log in. You can reset anytime. Min 8 characters.
password.helperSuffix: to log in. You can reset anytime. Min 8 characters.

schoolYear.label: School Year
schoolYear.helper: Most students start in Year 4 or Year 5

region.label: Region
region.helper: Choose where your target schools are located

photo.label: Profile Photo
photo.uploadText: Upload a photo or drag and drop
photo.helperFallback: Add a photo so your child recognises their account
photo.fallbackNote: A friendly avatar is used if skipped
